scripts.dev: npm run build:dev && npm run copy-assets
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:scripts && npm run copy-assets && npm run fix-html
scripts.build:prod: vite build --mode production && node scripts/build-scripts.js --production && npm run copy-assets && npm run fix-html
scripts.copy-assets: cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r public/icons dist/
scripts.fix-html: mv dist/src/popup/index.html dist/popup/ 2>/dev/null || true && mv dist/src/pages/*.html dist/pages/ 2>/dev/null || true && rm -rf dist/src 2>/dev/null || true && node scripts/fix-paths.js
scripts.test:real: npm run build && npx playwright test tests/e2e/real-extension-full.spec.ts --project=real-extension
scripts.test:real:headless: npm run build && HEADLESS=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/real-extension-full.spec.ts --project=real-extension
scripts.test:real:only: npm run build && npx playwright test tests/e2e/real-extension-full.spec.ts --project=real-extension
scripts.package: npm run build:prod && cd dist && zip -r ../container-shield.zip .
